title: Book Tweaks
description: Utilities for books, including pasting multiple pages, next-page word wrap, page memory, and more!
body:
# Book Tweaks

![Image showing an example of the features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6310a32bbda2be4f0b7f82bba79b40dbdc774120.png)

This lightweight client-side mod enhances the experience of reading and writing books in Minecraft while keeping the feel completely vanilla. It uses only native Minecraft textures and interface elements, blending seamlessly into the game as if it were part of the original design.

## Cross-page Features
- Paste multiple pages
- Word wrap onto the next page while typing
- Arrow key support
- Backspace to the previous page

## Jump-to-Start/End Buttons
Quickly navigate to the beginning or end of any book without endless page-turning.

## Page Memory
Each book remembers the last page you were reading, so you can pick up right where you left off—even after closing and reopening the book.

## Persistence
The mod automatically saves the page you were reading of books you’ve opened (configurable, defaulting to the latest 100) between game sessions. This information is stored in a configuration file, allowing you to adjust how many entries to keep or clear the remembered page number entirely.

## Vanilla Feel
Book Utilities is designed to feel like a natural extension of the game — no cluttered menus, no out-of-place icons, just smooth and intuitive improvements for players who love using books.
